payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Interior window with closed white horizontal vinyl blinds filling the pane, set in a dark-painted wooden frame with dark curtains visible at the sides; slatted blinds are slightly uneven and the lower edge of the window is partially cropped by the image; light filters through the blinds creating diffuse brightness; estimated distance ~2.0 m from camera.

message.content: {"label":"window","short_description":"white horizontal-blind window, dark frame","long_description":"Interior window with closed white horizontal vinyl blinds filling the pane, set in a dark-painted wooden frame with dark curtains visible at the sides; slatted blinds are slightly uneven and the lower edge of the window is partially cropped by the image; light filters through the blinds creating diffuse brightness; estimated distance ~2.0 m from camera.","attributes":["white horizontal blinds","closed blinds","slatted/venetian style","dark wooden/frame paint","dark side curtains","slats slightly uneven","bottom edge partially cropped","diffuse light through blinds"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.0}
